enriched_points.expanded_content: Template-assisted methods enable precise control over nanostructure shape and size, utilizing templates for the synthesis of complex nanomaterials with tailored properties.
Colloidal synthesis involves creating nanoparticles through chemical reactions in solution, allowing for uniform sizes and shapes, crucial for applications in electronics and medicine.
Electrospinning creates nanofibers by applying a high voltage to a polymer solution, producing fibers with high surface area for use in filtration, scaffolding, and drug delivery.
These techniques offer advantages such as scalability and versatility, with applications spanning nanomedicine, energy storage, and environmental remediation.
Emerging techniques in nanofabrication, such as 3D printing at the nanoscale, promise to revolutionize material design and fabrication processes for advanced applications.
